title: AI agents to match physical workforce at TCS soon: Chairman N Chandrasekaran
description: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) Chairman N Chandrasekaran on Tuesday said the company is investing in building artificial intelligence (AI) agents and expects a future where the number of AI agents working alongside the firm could match its physical workforce. title: Govt approves decree regulating use of AI by law enforcement
description: Premier Giorgia Meloni's cabinet on Wednesday approved a decree regulating the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) by police, a measure passed to comply with European regulations. (ANSA)

title: AI is boosting accuracy for clinicians, Philips North America CEO says
